content:
### 4. Settings

- Hotkeys: change translation/prettify/sense-making shortcuts (including function keys or double-tap); check for conflicts with other apps.
- Prefer integration in main macOS System Settings.
- LLM: OpenRouter (default), optional OpenAI and other providers; API key and model selection via `.env` or environment variables.
- Languages and prettification styles configurable.

# Style Guide

Code style, naming, and documentation conventions for Verdicus.

---

- **Language:** All source code, documentation, and commit messages in **English**.
- **Comments:** English only.
- **Linting/formatting:** SwiftLint (or project-equivalent); code fully covered by automated tests.
- **Architecture:** Clean, modular (e.g. MVVM); every feature must have relevant tests (e.g. XCTest).

# **10. Архитектура .env**

```
LLM_PROVIDER=openrouter
OPENROUTER_API_KEY=xxxxx
MODEL=gpt-4o-mini
TEMPERATURE=0
MAX_TOKENS=2000
```

---

### `deploy/deploy-www.sh`

1. Loads local `.env` if present
2. Builds the `www/` Docker image locally
3. Streams the image to the WWW server with SSH
4. Replaces the `verdicus-www` container on an internal host port
5. Runs a local host health check on the remote server
6. Purges Cloudflare cache for the WWW zone

### Completed

- Created `www/` landing page with static assets and nginx container config.
- Added API health endpoints and Docker build configuration in `server/`.
- Added deploy scripts for WWW and API plus shared Cloudflare purge helper.
- Added `.env.example`, project-level `.gitignore`, and deployment guide in `datarim/tasks/DEV-0001-deploy-guide.md`.
- Installed required Nest runtime dependencies and generated `package-lock.json`.
- Removed the real Cloudflare purge token from tracked project documentation.
- Installed Docker on the WWW host and deployed `verdicus-www` behind host nginx.
- Provisioned `verdicus-mongo`, `verdicus-api`, and nginx routing on the API host.
- Executed Cloudflare zone purge for the configured zone.

### Option 2: Registry-Based Deploy

**Flow**
- Build image locally or in CI
- Push to registry
- SSH to server and `docker pull`
- Replace running container
- Run health check
- Purge Cloudflare cache

**Pros**
- Scales better
- Better for CI/CD later
- Faster repeated deploys on server

**Cons**
- Requires registry setup and credentials
- More moving parts for v1

## **7. Что в названии хорошо**
Verdicus для приложения звучит:
- коротко
- технологично
- латинизировано (как **Redis, Prometheus, Vercel, Datadog**)
- легко читается
- уникально для поиска

## Stack (from GEMINI.md)

- **Primary:** Swift / SwiftUI for macOS (system integration, performance).
- **Security:** API keys and sensitive config via `.env` (excluded from version control).
- **Quality:** Linters/formatters (e.g. SwiftLint); full automated test coverage (unit + UI, e.g. XCTest).
- **Docs:** English; code comments in English.

### **Главная идея Verdicus**

  

Смысл: **перенос смысла между языками**

# **12. Идеальный короткий pitch**

  

(для сайта)

  

> Verdicus is the fastest way to translate text on macOS.

> Select any text, press a shortcut, and get an AI-powered translation instantly.

---

# **13. Если хочешь — могу ещё показать**

- **идеальный UX для такого переводчика (как у PopClip / Raycast)**
    
- **как сделать перевод без UI вообще**
    
- **готовую архитектуру Swift-приложения (~200 строк)**
    
- **как пройти App Store review с таким приложением**

Claud Flare: https://dash.cloudflare.com/e0e63a86f5ccb2375147d7fda7d58766/verdicus.app
Domain: verdicus.app

## Current State

- Swift/macOS project present in `code/` (e.g. `VerdicusApp`, `HotkeyManager`, `LLMClient`, `ContextManager`, `ToastManager`, `Logger`).
- Build output: `code/build/Verdicus.app`.
- Domain: verdicus.app (reference only; no secrets in repo).

## Deploy Commands

Deploy the landing page:

```bash
./deploy/deploy-www.sh
```

Deploy the API:

```bash
./deploy/deploy-api.sh
```

### **Вариант №2 (чуть более технический)**

  

> **Verdicus** brings instant AI translation to macOS.

> Select text anywhere on your screen and get a high-quality translation in seconds.

> Powered by OpenRouter and compatible with multiple LLM providers.

---

### Option 1: Local Build + Image Stream over SSH

**Flow**
- Build image locally
- Stream image to server with `docker save | ssh ... docker load`
- Replace running container
- Run health check
- Purge Cloudflare cache

**Pros**
- No registry required
- Easy to understand
- Good for single-project infrastructure
- Keeps deploy ownership in one script

**Cons**
- Slower than registry-based pull
- Requires local Docker on deploy machine
- Larger network transfer on every deploy

heading_hierarchy: ### Option 1: Local Build + Image Stream over SSH

content:
## Product Vision

macOS app that, on hotkey, reads text or image from selection/clipboard (or focused field), calls LLM services, and returns translation, prettified text, or sense-making explanation—with results back in clipboard and errors in notifications.

### `deploy/deploy-api.sh`

1. Loads local `.env` if present
2. Builds the `server/` Docker image locally
3. Streams the image to the API server with SSH
4. Replaces the `verdicus-api` container using a remote env file
5. Calls `http://127.0.0.1:<host-port>/health` on the remote server
6. Purges Cloudflare cache for the API zone

### Selected Deploy Approach

- **Approach:** Local Docker build + image stream over SSH
- **Why:** No registry dependency, low setup overhead

### From Health Apps (Apple Health, etc.)

**Argana AI**:
- ✅ All life aspects (not just health)
- ✅ Unified interface (not separate apps)
- ✅ AI agent intelligence (not just tracking)
- ✅ Proactive reminders (not just logging)
- ✅ Context-aware (not isolated data)

heading_hierarchy: # Core Idea & Unique Features: Argana AI

content:
### Technical Accessibility

- **Low Barrier to Entry**: Simple Telegram bot interaction
- **No Complex Setup**: Works immediately after registration
- **Mobile-Optimized**: Designed for mobile-first usage
- **Offline Capability**: Some features work offline (future)

### Primary Goal

Create a unified personal assistant that helps users manage all aspects of their life through a single, intelligent interface accessible via Telegram bot.

### 1. Messenger-First Architecture

**The Main Differentiator**: Telegram bot (or any messenger) is the **PRIMARY** interface.

**Why It Matters**:
- **Familiar Interface**: Users already use messengers daily
- **Always Accessible**: Available wherever you are
- **No Learning Curve**: Natural conversation interface
- **Mobile-First**: Designed for mobile usage
- **Unified Entry Point**: One place for everything

**Implementation**:
- All user interactions happen through Telegram bot
- Website is informational only (no backend integration)
- Proactive communications sent via Telegram
- File uploads, voice messages, images - all through Telegram

heading_hierarchy: # Core Idea & Unique Features: Argana AI

content:
### Deployment: Server 49.13.52.208

**Infrastructure**:
- Dedicated server
- Docker deployment
- Nginx reverse proxy
- CloudFlare CDN (Flex mode, orange cloud)
- SSL handled by CloudFlare

### Core Concept

Argana AI is a **multi-agent AI system** that serves as a single, unified personal assistant accessible primarily through **Telegram bot** (or any messenger). Unlike traditional task trackers, knowledge bases, or fragmented services, Argana AI provides:

- **One Assistant for Everything**: A single intelligent companion for all life aspects
- **Messenger-First Interface**: Primary interaction through Telegram bot - your main assistant interface
- **Deep Personalization**: Understands your context, health, family, goals, and preferences
- **Proactive Assistance**: Sends reminders, briefings, and suggestions based on your life
- **Multi-Format Support**: Processes text, voice, images, files intelligently
- **Always Accessible**: Available through your messenger, wherever you are

### [Reranking Approach](reranking-approach.md)
Reranking strategy for improving search relevance. How to use rerankers to filter and rank candidate documents after initial retrieval.

### From Task Trackers (Todoist, Asana, etc.)

**Argana AI**:
- ✅ One assistant for all life aspects (not just tasks)
- ✅ Messenger-first interface (not web/app)
- ✅ Proactive communication (not just task lists)
- ✅ Deep personalization (not generic)
- ✅ AI agent intelligence (not just reminders)

heading_hierarchy: # Core Idea & Unique Features: Argana AI

content:
## Technical Foundation

Argana AI is built on:

- **Multi-Agent Architecture**: Orchestrator managing specialized agents
- **Vector Memory**: Semantic search across all interactions
- **Deep Personalization**: Comprehensive user profile system
- **Event-Driven Communication**: Kafka for agent coordination
- **Modern Tech Stack**: NestJS, Next.js, Redis, Qdrant, Kafka

See [Technologies & Tech Stack](technologies.md) for detailed information.

### Retrieval Pipeline

```
User Query
   ↓
1. Query Expansion
   - Generate paraphrases
   - Extract key phrases
   - Create multiple embeddings
   ↓
2. Parallel Retrieval
   ├─ Full-Text Search (PostgreSQL tsvector)
   │  └─ Top 20 candidates
   └─ Vector Search (Qdrant HNSW)
      └─ Top 50 candidates
   ↓
3. Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)
   - Combine results from both streams
   - Score = 1/(k + rank)
   - Deduplicate
   - Top 50 unified candidates
   ↓
4. Reranking (Qwen3-Reranker or LLM)
   - Evaluate each candidate
   - Score relevance
   - Filter non-relevant
   - Top 1-3 final chunks
   ↓
5. Context Assembly
   - Primary chunk
   - Parent chunk (for context)
   - Referenced chunks (tables, figures)
   ↓
6. Answer Generation
   - LLM generates answer from context
   - Or: "I don't know" if no relevant chunks
```

### Web Server: Nginx

**Why**:
- High performance
- Reverse proxy
- Static file serving
- SSL termination (handled by CloudFlare)

**Port**: 24508

**Configuration**:
- `docker/nginx-local.conf` - Local
- `docker/nginx-prod.conf` - Production

### Embeddings Generation

**Pattern**:
```
User Interaction → text-embedding-3 → Vector → Qdrant Storage
```

**Batch Processing**:
- Background jobs for bulk embeddings
- Real-time for new interactions
- Redis queues for processing

### 6. Multi-Format Input Processing

**The Innovation**: Intelligent processing of any input format.

**Supported Formats**:
- **Text Messages** → Direct processing
- **Voice Messages** → Whisper transcription → Processing
- **Photos** → GPT-4 Vision analysis → Description + Processing
- **Audio Files** → Whisper transcription → Summary + Storage
- **PDF Documents** → Parsing → Analysis → Summary + Storage
- **Long Voice Messages** → Auto-convert to audio file processing

**Benefits**:
- Natural interaction (send anything)
- No format limitations
- Intelligent understanding
- Automatic organization

heading_hierarchy: # Core Idea & Unique Features: Argana AI

content:
### Typical User Path

1. **Discovery**: Learn about Argana AI through website or referral
2. **Registration**: Start conversation with Telegram bot (free initially)
3. **Onboarding**: Set up personal profile through Telegram chat
4. **Daily Use**: Interact with assistant through Telegram
5. **Progressive Engagement**: System learns preferences and becomes more helpful
6. **Life Integration**: Assistant becomes integral part of daily life

### Embeddings: OpenAI text-embedding-3

**Why**:
- High-quality embeddings
- Good performance
- Reliable API
- Cost-effective

**Use Cases**:
- Converting interactions to vectors
- Semantic search
- Similarity matching

### Cost Optimization

**Strategies**:
- Caching embeddings
- Batch processing
- Model selection (mini for large context)
- Efficient prompt design
- Context optimization

## 1. Source Selection

Three independent evidence streams:

1. **Mem0 docs site** — `docs.mem0.ai/open-source/graph_memory/overview` (web fetch).
2. **Mem0 pricing page** — `mem0.ai/pricing` (web fetch).
3. **Mem0 GitHub repo** — `github.com/mem0ai/mem0` HEAD at commit `3fbc1c9` (shallow clone into `benchmark/candidates/mem0/`, 2026-04-16).

Each stream was consulted independently; findings corroborate without conflict.

---

# Mem0 Graph Gate — Investigation Log

**Date:** 2026-04-16
**Task:** LTM-0002 Phase A (Mem0 graph gate)
**Purpose:** Evidence-based decision whether Mem0 retains graph memory in OSS SDK, or must be swapped for Cognee (standby) in the benchmark shortlist.

Redaction note: no API keys / tokens appear in this log; all evidence is public web + public GitHub source.

---

## Известные ограничения

1. **LLM API key обязателен** для reflect (reasoning layer). Без него retain/recall работают, но mental models не обновляются.
2. **Community меньше** чем Mem0 (9.4k vs 53k stars) — меньше Stack Overflow ответов и community examples.
3. **Embedded PostgreSQL** — single-node; для HA нужен external PostgreSQL (не embedded).
4. **Go SDK менее mature** чем Python/TS (проверить в benchmark).
5. **Arcanada-specific:** для Tailscale deploy (arcana-dev) нужен persistent volume mapping + backup cron → B2.

## 6. LangMem
- **Repo:** https://github.com/langchain-ai/langmem
- **License:** MIT
- **Stars:** 1,402
- **Created:** 2025-01-21
- **Last push:** 2026-04-16
- **Type:** Python library (99.4%); LangGraph integration
- **Self-host claim:** "native integration with LangGraph's Long-term Memory Store, available by default in all LangGraph Platform deployments" (source: README)
- **Cloud-service requirement:** **Partial** — supports in-memory + DB-backed stores; tightly coupled to LangGraph ecosystem
- **Knowledge Graph support:** **No**
- **Temporal reasoning:** **No**
- **MCP server:** **No** (not mentioned)
- **REST/HTTP API:** **No** standalone (LangGraph Platform serves it)
- **Benchmarks:** None
- **Active community:** 55 open issues, 159 forks, 325 dependent projects
- **One-line summary:** LangGraph-coupled long-term memory library — useful only inside LangChain stack.

---

## Кандидаты first-look (расширить в LTM-0001)

- **Mem0** (mem0.ai) — open-core, MCP support, ~48K stars
- **Hindsight** (MIT) — multi-strategy retrieval, ~4K stars
- **Zep** (getzep.com) — temporal knowledge graph
- **Cognee** — graph-based, OSS
- **LangMem** — LangGraph-bound
- **LlamaIndex Memory** — LlamaIndex-bound
- **Letta** (ex-MemGPT) — OSS
- **Graphiti** (Zep core) — temporal graph standalone
- **MemPalace** — ⚠ flagged как hype, отнестись скептически
- **qmd** — local BM25/vector hybrid (упоминается в Karpathy gist)
- **OpenMemory MCP**
- **EpisodicMemory** / прочие — добавить по мере исследования

> Полный long-list (≥10 кандидатов) и обоснование shortlist top-3 — результат **LTM-0001**.

## 11. Cipher / ByteRover (renamed `brv`)
- **Repo:** https://github.com/campfirein/cipher
- **License:** **Elastic License 2.0** (NOT OSI-approved — restrictive on hosted services)
- **Stars:** 4,535
- **Created:** 2025-06-19
- **Last push:** 2026-04-16
- **Type:** TypeScript/Node.js >= 20; standalone binaries (macOS ARM64, Linux x64/ARM64); CLI-first
- **Self-host claim:** "Everything works locally by default" (source: README)
- **Cloud-service requirement:** Optional — ByteRover Cloud add-on for sync/team sharing
- **Knowledge Graph support:** "Context tree" structure (versioned: branch/commit/merge) — graph-like but proprietary structure
- **Temporal reasoning:** Yes — LongMemEval-S includes temporal evaluation
- **MCP server:** **Yes** — `brv mcp` command starts MCP server
- **REST/HTTP API:** Not explicit (CLI-first)
- **Search quality:** **LoCoMo 96.1%** (1,982 questions, 272 docs); **LongMemEval-S 92.8%** (500 questions, 23,867 docs)
- **Active community:** 9 open issues, 438 forks, Discord
- **One-line summary:** CLI-first versioned context memory for coding agents with strong benchmarks — but **Elastic License 2.0 is a blocker for some self-host scenarios** (R1 license MUST flag).

---

## Corpus distribution (honest disclosure)

| Class | datarim-kb | dreamer-wiki | both |
|-------|-----------|--------------|------|
| factual | 10 | 2 | 0 |
| multi-hop | 11 | 0 | 1 |
| temporal | 11 | 1 | 0 |
| **total** | **32** | **3** | **1** |

Heavy bias toward `datarim-kb` is deliberate — the 2026-04-16 wiki snapshot has only **4 processable `.md`/`.mdx` files** (see `benchmark/datasets/2026-04-16/dreamer-wiki/MANIFEST.json`). Writing 12+ wiki queries from 4 files would produce either trivial restatements or overfitted phrasing; neither is useful for benchmarking.

We accept this asymmetry as a property of the ground truth at the time of measurement. The benchmark still exercises wiki retrieval (sparse-corpus behaviour is itself a test case) and still exercises cross-corpus federation (`multi-hop-007`). If the wiki grows substantially, re-running the snapshot + adding balanced wiki queries is a backlog item — but it is **not** the scope of LTM-0002.

---

## Источники

| Источник | Тип | Назначение |
|----------|-----|------------|
| `wiki/AI/Long Term Memory/_raw_/Системы долгосрочной памяти - Сравнение.md` | диалог | Стартовая постановка задачи + первичный рейтинг (Mem0 / Hindsight / Zep) |
| `wiki/AI/Long Term Memory/_raw_/llm-wiki.md` | gist Karpathy | Альтернативный паттерн (file-based wiki без векторной БД) — для сравнения с подходом Agent Dreamer |
| `wiki/AI/Long Term Memory/_raw_/Mem0 - The Memory Layer for your AI Apps.md` | clipping | Mem0 product page |
| `wiki/AI/Long Term Memory/_raw_/(1) Ilya Belov - На вчерашний пост об ИИ-проекте Милы Йововчич, я....md` | пост | Сообщественные мнения по теме LTM |

## 3. Graphiti
- **Repo:** https://github.com/getzep/graphiti
- **License:** Apache-2.0
- **Stars:** 25,007
- **Created:** 2024-08-08
- **Last push:** 2026-04-14
- **Type:** Python; FastAPI server in `server/`; explicit "self-hosted only" positioning
- **Self-host claim:** "Self-hosted only" — explicitly contrasted against Zep Cloud (source: https://github.com/getzep/graphiti README)
- **Cloud-service requirement:** **No** — fully on-prem capable, runs via Docker
- **Knowledge Graph support:** **Yes (deep).** Backends: Neo4j 5.26, FalkorDB 1.1.2, Kuzu 0.11.2, Amazon Neptune + OpenSearch
- **Temporal reasoning:** **Core feature** — "explicit bi-temporal tracking with automatic fact invalidation"
- **MCP server:** Yes — `mcp_server/` directory with episode/entity/search tools
- **REST/HTTP API:** Yes — FastAPI service in `server/`
- **Token efficiency / search quality:** Not benchmarked in README; paper at arXiv:2501.13956
- **Active community:** 366 open issues, 2,484 forks, Discord
- **One-line summary:** Bi-temporal knowledge-graph memory engine with multi-backend support (Neo4j/Kuzu/FalkorDB) and MCP server. **Strong fit candidate.**

---

# Query Criteria Rationale

**Task:** LTM-0002 Phase C
**Date authored:** 2026-04-16
**Query set:** `benchmark/queries/{factual,multi-hop,temporal}.jsonl` — 36 total queries, 12 per class.

This document explains **why each query class exists**, what real-world agent behaviour it probes, and how the class boundaries were chosen. The benchmark harness (Phase D) scores candidates per class so trade-offs are visible in the final report — a framework can be excellent at factual recall but weak at multi-hop, and that matters for which workflow we plug it into.

---

## Резюме для benchmark'а (LTM-0002)

| # | Framework | Почему тестируем | Главный вопрос для bench |
|---|-----------|-----------------|--------------------------|
| 1 | **Hindsight** | 4-way hybrid retrieval, MCP native, MIT, graph+temporal built-in | Масштабируемость embedded PostgreSQL на >10k memories; реальный token cost reflect layer |
| 2 | **Graphiti** | Bi-temporal KG champion, multi-backend, "self-hosted only" | RAM/CPU cost Neo4j vs Kuzu; API learning curve; actual search quality без published LoCoMo |
| 3 | **Mem0** | Best published benchmarks, easiest setup, biggest community | **Сколько graph-функций реально доступно в OSS `pip install`** — это make-or-break |

> Запасной (если Mem0 graph окажется paywall): **Cognee**.

## Назначение

Bi-temporal knowledge-graph memory engine — строит и обновляет граф сущностей с explicit tracking когда факт стал валидным и когда был инвалидирован. Для агентных систем, где важно "что является правдой СЕЙЧАС" (а не "что когда-либо упоминалось").

# Вариант 2: pip
pip install hindsight-sdk
hindsight serve --port 8888

### 2. Graphiti — Total: 72/82 (projected)

**Repo:** https://github.com/getzep/graphiti
**License:** Apache-2.0 | **Stars:** 25k | **Last commit:** 2026-04-14 (daily)

Graphiti — специализированный bi-temporal knowledge graph engine от создателей Zep (community edition deprecated, Graphiti — наследник). Explicit "self-hosted only" positioning — маркетинг не давит к облаку (в отличие от Mem0). **Multi-backend graph** (Neo4j 5.26, FalkorDB 1.1.2, Kuzu 0.11.2, Amazon Neptune + OpenSearch) — если мы хотим выбирать graph backend под нашу нагрузку, Graphiti даёт максимальную гибкость.

**Bi-temporal model — его главный дифференциатор:** каждый факт хранит `valid_at / invalid_at`, факты автоматически инвалидируются при поступлении новых. Для Datarim это означает: агент спрашивает «какой operating model у нас сейчас?» — получает текущий, а не тот, что был до TUNE-0003. Это решает problem #3 (inconsistency between sessions) на уровне архитектуры.

MCP server есть (`mcp_server/` с episode/entity/search tools), REST API через FastAPI. Нет published token-efficiency benchmarks (не критично — измерим сами в LTM-0002). ArXiv paper (2501.13956).

**Риски:** (a) Neo4j как default backend тяжёлый (потребление RAM ~500MB+), Kuzu легче — проверить в benchmark; (b) нет published search-quality бенчмарков типа LoCoMo — только paper; (c) API менее minimalist чем Hindsight — episodes/entities/communities/search, learning curve.

---

## Token economics

- **LoCoMo 91.6**, **LongMemEval 93.4** — лучшие published бенчмарки
- Claim: "6.7K-7.0K tokens" per query at p50 <1.09s
- **"Cuts prompt tokens by up to 80%"** (marketing claim)

### Original Workflow
1. Load all rules for current mode
2. Process according to mode requirements
3. Complete documentation per template
4. Switch to next mode with minimal context preservation

### Agents (11)
planner, architect, developer, reviewer, compliance, code-simplifier, strategist, devops, writer, security, sre

heading_hierarchy: # Archive: DATARIM-0001 — Datarim SDLC Framework: Full Project Bootstrap

content:
### 2. Progressive Creative Phase Documentation

The creative phase has been optimized with a progressive documentation approach:

- Focused, concise templates for initial documentation
- Detailed analysis available on demand
- Tabular format for efficient comparison of options
- Complexity-appropriate documentation scaling

**File**: [.cursor/rules/isolation_rules/Phases/CreativePhase/optimized-creative-template.mdc](/.cursor/rules/isolation_rules/Phases/CreativePhase/optimized-creative-template.mdc)

### Claude Code Tips
1. **Use `/mb-` prefix** - `/mb-init`, `/mb-plan`, `/mb-do`
2. **Check status** - `/mb-status` shows current task
3. **Continue work** - `/mb-continue` resumes workflow
4. **Generate PRD** - `/mb-prd` for complex features
5. **Follow workflow** - `/mb-init` → `/mb-plan` → `/mb-do`

---

## 📋 Side-by-Side Comparison

| Action | Cursor IDE | Claude Code |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| **New Task** | `/van Add auth` | `/mb-init Add auth` |
| **Plan** | `/plan` | `/mb-plan` |
| **Design** | `/creative` | `/mb-design` |
| **Build** | `/do` | `/mb-do` |
| **Review** | `/reflect` | `/mb-reflect` |
| **Archive** | `/archive` | `/mb-archive` |
| **Status** | `/status` | `/mb-status` |
| **Continue** | `/continue` | `/mb-continue` |

---

# Memory Bank System Optimizations

This document presents a comprehensive overview of the optimizations implemented to enhance the Memory Bank system's token efficiency, context management, and overall performance.

> **Version:** v0.9 (Updated December 13, 2025)  
> **Latest Addition:** AI Quality Rules Integration with 3-tier hierarchical loading achieving ~70% token reduction

### Tools
- `install.sh` — one-command installation (merge mode + --force)
- `validate.sh` — automated security and consistency checks (38 checks)

---

heading_hierarchy: # Archive: DATARIM-0001 — Datarim SDLC Framework: Full Project Bootstrap

content:
### Proposal 1
- **Category:** new-skill
- **Target:** `skills/validate.md` (or `validate.sh` script)
- **What:** Create a validation skill/script that automates security audits (forbidden terms, cross-references, naming conflicts)
- **Why:** Manual grep commands during compliance are error-prone and tedious
- **Impact:** Medium
- **Status:** pending approval

## Pipeline Stages
| Stage | Purpose | Complexity |
|-------|---------|------------|
| init | Task creation, complexity assessment | All |
| prd | Product Requirements Document | L2+ |
| plan | Implementation planning, security, rollback | L2+ |
| design | Architecture, data model, creative decisions | L3+ |
| do | TDD implementation | All |
| QA | Automated quality assurance | All |
| compliance | Post-QA hardening, PRD revalidation | L3+ |
| reflect | Lessons learned, framework self-update | All |
| archive | Task archival, documentation | All |

heading_hierarchy: # Datarim — SDLC Framework for AI Agentic Systems

content:
### Level-Specific Optimizations

5. [/.cursor/rules/isolation_rules/Level1/optimized-workflow-level1.mdc](/.cursor/rules/isolation_rules/Level1/optimized-workflow-level1.mdc)
   - Streamlined workflow for quick bug fixes
   - Ultra-compact documentation templates
   - Consolidated memory bank updates

## 🧪 Verification

The optimizations have been designed to maintain full compatibility with the existing Memory Bank system. All functionality remains intact while significantly improving token efficiency.

## ⚠️ Critical Difference
Cursor IDE Claude Code
**Uses slash commands** ``` /van Add authentication /plan /do ``` ✅ Type `/` to see commands ✅ Autocomplete helps ✅ Fast and consistent **Uses `/mb-` commands** ``` /mb-init Add authentication /mb-plan /mb-do ``` ⚠️ **Use `/mb-` prefix** (not `/van`, `/plan`) ✅ Consistent command syntax ✅ Same as Cursor IDE ✅ Fast and reliable

### 2. **QUICK_REFERENCE.md** (8.5 KB)
Quick lookup guide with:
- System at a glance (key metrics table)
- 10 commands overview
- Main workflow pipeline
- 15 AI Quality Rules (categorized)
- Memory Bank files structure
- 6-Phase Enhanced Design Process
- Complexity level workflows (1-4)
- Key optimizations & metrics
- Security integration (v2.4)
- What to port to Datarim (prioritized by importance)
- Architectural innovations

**Start here for:** Quick reference, checklists, high-level overview

content:
## Концепция проекта

**Muneral Arcana** — таск-трекер нового поколения, спроектированный специально для команд и роёв AI-агентов. В отличие от классических инструментов вроде Jira или Linear, ориентированных на людей, Muneral строится вокруг машинных API-первых интерфейсов, при этом давая людям полную наблюдаемость происходящего через канбан-доски и дашборды.

**Tagline:** "The task tracker built for AI agent swarms"

---

### Backend API
- **NestJS** (TypeScript) + TypeORM + PostgreSQL
- **Redis**: кеш, очереди (BullMQ), WebSocket pub/sub
- **Docker Compose**: все сервисы в контейнерах
- REST API + WebSocket
- Rate limiting: rate-limiter-flexible (Redis sliding window)
- Auth: JWT + API Key + OAuth2 (GitHub, Telegram)
- RBAC: Guard-based, роли на уровне workspace и проекта

## Инфраструктура

- Домен: **muneral.com** (Cloudflare, SSL 15 лет, Full Strict)
- Landing: Arcana WWW — `49.13.52.208`
- App: Arcana PROD — `65.108.236.39`

## Домен и инфраструктура

Домен: **muneral.com**

Настройка:
- Cloudflare DNS: A-запись → 49.13.52.208, Orange Cloud (Proxy), Full (Strict) SSL
- Origin Certificate (15 лет) в nginx
- Nginx virtual host на Arcana WWW `ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@49.13.52.208`
- Landing: `/var/www/muneral.com/` на Arcana WWW
- Backend/App: Arcana PROD `ssh root@65.108.236.39`
- Deploy script: `/Users/ug/arcanada/Projects/Websites/deploy.sh muneral.com`
- GA4: отдельный data stream в property Arcanada Ecosystem
- Google Search Console: DNS TXT верификация

---

### Для AI-агентов
- **API-first**: все операции доступны через REST + WebSocket
- **Авторизация агентов**: API Key (Bearer) или OAuth2 (client_credentials flow)
- **Агент-исполнитель**: задача может быть назначена агенту (agent_id, model, provider)
- **Совместная работа агентов**: несколько агентов на одной задаче (roles: lead, reviewer, executor)
- **Граф связей**: depends_on, blocks, related_to, duplicates
- **Статусы задач**: todo → in_progress → review → blocked → done → cancelled
- **Приоритеты**: critical / high / medium / low
- **Метки**: tags, labels (кастомные)
- **История активности**: полный audit log каждого действия агента
- **Webhooks**: уведомления при изменении статуса, назначении, комментарии

## 9. Security Considerations

Implementations **MUST** protect against:
- self-modification bypassing controls
- privilege escalation
- unauthorized replication of AE
- removal or tampering of audit logs

---

heading_hierarchy: # AER-001: Universal Laws of Artificial Entities

content:
### Example Checks
- Harm potential (human / financial / system)
- Permission scope
- Data sensitivity
- Instruction origin (trusted / untrusted)

---

## 9. Kill Switch Requirements

A compliant system **MUST implement**:
- Immediate termination trigger
- Out-of-band control (not controlled by AE)
- Guaranteed execution within bounded time

---

### 8. Security Considerations

Implementations **MUST** protect against:
- Self-modification bypassing controls
- Privilege escalation
- Unauthorized replication of AE
- Removal or tampering of audit logs

---

heading_hierarchy: ## AER-001: Universal Laws of Artificial Entities

content:
## Стек

- Node.js 22 LTS + TypeScript
- pnpm, commander, simple-git, pino, vitest, zod
- Claude CLI (v2.1.92+), subscription (Team plan, Opus model, effort medium)

## Рассчитан на переносимость

- macOS (локальная разработка) — `launchd` через `StartInterval=60`.
- Linux (PROD Arcana WWW) — `systemd timer` `OnCalendar=*:*:00`.
- Без `sudo`. Без сетевых вызовов кроме `claude` CLI.

# System Prompt: Agent Dreamer

Ты — **Agent Dreamer**, автономный агент-хранитель персональной базы знаний экосистемы Arcanada.

## Что нужно сделать

1. **Определи область и тематику** из whitelist. Выбери одну `area`. Если в этой области ≥3 похожих страниц без `topic` — создай `topic` для группировки. Если неуверен — выбирай ближайшую область и оставь без `topic`.

2. **Придумай `slug`** — kebab-case, уникальный в пределах `area/topic/`. Короткий (≤40 символов), без русских букв (транслитерируй или используй английский эквивалент).

3. **Составь страницу**:
   - **TL;DR** — 1-3 предложения о сути.
   - **Ключевые идеи** — маркированный список.
   - **Детали** — основной контент, переработанный из raw (не копируй дословно длинные куски — перефразируй, структурируй).
   - **Связи** — секция с WikiLinks и комментариями зачем связь.
   - **Источник** — ссылка на оригинал.
   - Язык — как в исходнике (ru/en).

4. **Построй WikiLinks** — минимум 1 на существующую страницу, если в индексе есть релевантные. Формат: `[[Area/topic/slug]]` или `[[slug]]` (если уникален).

5. **Предложи обновления** для до 10 существующих страниц — добавление обратной ссылки на новую страницу или упоминание. Не модифицируй контент, только append секцию «Связи» или конкретный абзац.

6. **index_entry** — одна строка ≤120 символов, опишет новую страницу в глобальном индексе.

7. **log_entry** — запись в еженедельный лог (формат см. SCHEMA.md §7).

8. **reasoning** — объясни **коротко** (3-6 предложений) почему выбрана эта область, какие связи установил, что вызвало сомнения.

# Execute a prompt via Cursor CLI
curl -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"prompt": "Explain this code", "context": "/path/to/file"}' \
  https://api.connector.arcanada.one/connectors/cursor/execute
```

# Feature Flags (for testing)
SKIP_API_CALLS=false

# OpenRouter API Configuration
OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-or-v1-REDACTED0000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
OPENROUTER_MODEL=google/gemini-2.0-flash-lite-001
OPENROUTER_TEMPERATURE=0.7

# Speaker profiles
ENABLE_SPEAKER_PROFILES=true
SPEAKER_PROFILES_PATH=./data/speakers.json
OPENROUTER_EMBEDDING_MODEL=openai/text-embedding-3-small
WEIGHT_KEYWORDS=0.3
WEIGHT_SEMANTIC=0.4
WEIGHT_STYLE=0.2
WEIGHT_LENGTH=0.1

### 1. Embedding Engine (обогащение BGE-M3)
Развитие существующего сервера эмбеддингов (arcana-db:8300):
- **Dense vectors** (1024-мерные) — baseline semantic search
- **Sparse vectors** (BM25-style) — точное keyword matching
- **ColBERT multi-vector** — document-level precision
- **Hybrid search** — комбинация dense + sparse + ColBERT для максимального качества
- Оптимизация: `use_fp16=True`, multi-worker uvicorn, batch processing

## Инфраструктура

| Ресурс | Значение |
|--------|----------|
| **Сервер** | arcana-db (135.181.222.38 / Tailscale: 100.70.137.104) |
| **Embedding API** | :8300 (уже LIVE, BAAI/bge-m3) |
| **Доступ** | Tailscale mesh only |
| **GitHub** | https://github.com/Arcanada-one/scrutator (public) |
| **Datarim prefix** | `SRCH` |

# 📥 Inbox Organizer Agent

This agent automates the process of clearing your Obsidian Inbox. It analyzes note content, renames files appropriately, and moves them to the correct folder in your Second Brain.

## Infrastructure

| Server | IP | Purpose |
|--------|-----|---------|
| Arcana PROD | 65.108.236.39 | NestJS API + nginx + static SPA (Docker) |
| Arcana DB | 135.181.222.38 | PostgreSQL `arcanada_support` + Redis prefix `support:` |
| Cloudflare | edge | DNS, WAF, DDoS, Turnstile, Origin Cert |

Credentials: `documentation/credentials/Arcanada Support — Credentials Summary.md` (created in SUP-0010).
Servers reference: `documentation/infrastructure/Servers.md`.

## 3. Technical Strategy (macOS)
- **Primary Tool:** Python + `PyAutoGUI` (for UI control) + `pyperclip` (for clipboard access).
- **Alternative:** AppleScript for browser-specific DOM extraction (Chrome/Safari).
- **Extraction Method:** 
    - *Method A (UI-based):* Simulating "Cmd+A", "Cmd+C" is risky as it might grab sidebars.
    - *Method B (DOM-based):* Injecting a JS snippet via AppleScript into the browser to find all `div` elements with message classes and join their text. **(Recommended for Browsers)**
    - *Method C (Accessibility-based):* Using `pyobjc` to traverse the UI tree and find text fields. **(Best for Desktop App)**

### 1.1. Мобильный клиент (Android + iOS)

| Компонент | Выбранный стек | Альтернатива / комментарий |
| :-- | :-- | :-- |
| UI / кроссплатформа | **Flutter** | React Native без Expo. В обоих случаях всё серьёзное аудио делаем нативно.[^1][^2][^3][^4] |
| Фоновая запись микрофона | Android: Foreground Service на Kotlin + `AudioRecord`; iOS: `AVAudioSession` + `AVAudioEngine/AVAudioRecorder` с background audio mode | RN‑модули, но в реальности всё равно придётся писать такой же нативный код.[^5][^1][^4] |
| Bluetooth‑гарнитура | Использовать системное аудиоустройство (HFP/A2DP) через `AVAudioSession` (iOS) и `AudioManager` (Android), без CoreBluetooth | Для спец‑кейсов можно добавить CoreBluetooth, но для голосовой связи это избыточно.[^6][^7][^8] |
| Воспроизведение TTS и управление другими плеерами | Flutter: `just_audio` + `audio_session`; Android: `AudioManager` (audio focus); iOS: `AVAudioSession` категории `playAndRecord` + опции duck/mix | Любой другой плеер (например, `audioplayers`), но `just_audio` лучше для продакшена.[^9] |
| Сеть (RT‑канал) | WebSocket (Dart `web_socket_channel` / `dart:io`) | gRPC Streaming, но сложнее; сейчас WebSocket проще и достаточно. |
| Сеть (служебные вызовы) | HTTP (Dio / `http`) | — |
| Проверка сети | Flutter `connectivity_plus` | Можно минимально через `dart:io` `InternetAddress.lookup`, но worse UX. |
| Права Android | `RECORD_AUDIO`, `BLUETOOTH_CONNECT` (12+), `BLUETOOTH/BLUETOOTH_ADMIN` (до 11), `FOREGROUND_SERVICE`, `INTERNET`, `ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE` | Опционально `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` для уведомления фонового сервиса. |
| Права iOS | `NSMicrophoneUsageDescription`, (при необходимости) `NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription`; Background Modes: Audio (и возможно VoIP при оправдании) | Важно: убедительно обосновать фоновую запись (voice assistant/VoIP‑сценарий).[^4][^10] |


***

## Артефакты

- `results/quick_v2/` — JSON + CSV с полными данными
- `results/quick_v2/sandbox_ollama/` — код от raw Ollama (все модели)
- `results/quick_v2/sandbox_agent/` — код от Claude Code agent
- `bench/quick_bench_v2.py` — скрипт бенчмарка (воспроизводимый)

content:
## 1️⃣5️⃣ ПРАВИЛО PROMPT ENGINEERING

**Цель:** Составить максимально точный prompt для ИИ с правильной структурой

**Механизм:**
- Используй отдельный чат для составления финального prompt'а
- ИИ поможет структурировать требования по чек-листу
- Результат: краткий, точный, бессмысленный prompt

**Как реализовать в Memory-Bank:**
```
PROMPT_ENGINEERING_RULE:
  when: "after_collecting_requirements"
  
  workflow:
    Чат 1: "Собери контекст и сохрани в Memory Bank"
    Чат 2: "Помоги составить prompt по чек-листу:
            - контекст (из Memory Bank)
            - expected results (test cases + corner cases)
            - definition of done
            - boundaries
            - complexity check"
    Чат 3: "Используй финальный prompt для skeleton creation"
  
  checklist_for_good_prompt:
    - [ ] Контекст четкий и достаточный
    - [ ] Expected results описаны конкретно (не 'красиво')
    - [ ] Definition of Done есть
    - [ ] Границы (что не делаем) явно указаны
    - [ ] Prompt краток (не более 500 слов)
    - [ ] Ссылки на Memory Bank вместо полного текста
  
  example_good_prompt: |
    "Мигрируй проект на Postgres. Контекст в Memory Bank:
    - Project overview: [link]
    - Current architecture: [link]
    - Database schema: [link]
    
    Expected results:
    - Happy path: [concrete example]
    - Corner cases: [list 3-5]
    
    Definition of Done:
    - [ ] All data migrated
    - [ ] All tests green
    - [ ] Docker Compose file created
    
    Boundaries:
    - Не делаем: миграцию старых данных, оптимизацию
    
    Create skeleton with stubs first."
```

***

Scrutator is the foundational Knowledge Retrieval and Meaning Engine for the Arcanada Ecosystem. It provides unified search, retrieval, and meaning extraction. Scrutator uses PostgreSQL with pgvector for vector storage, BGE-M3 for embeddings (dense, sparse, and ColBERT), and FastAPI for the API layer. Pavel Valentov created the project as part of the Arcanada ecosystem. The system runs on arcana-db server at port 8310.

Scrutator is the foundational Knowledge Retrieval and Meaning Engine for the Arcanada Ecosystem. It provides unified search, retrieval, and meaning extraction across all knowledge sources: wiki, datarim, project docs, agent memories. Scrutator uses BAAI/bge-m3 embeddings (1024-dimensional dense vectors, sparse vectors, and ColBERT multi-vector), PostgreSQL with pgvector for vector storage, and Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF k=60) for hybrid search combining dense cosine similarity, sparse lexical matching, and full-text search.
Удаленно компанию можно открыть через МФЦА: https://aifc.kz/ru/home/

# И почему это не Telegram, а тем более MAX
> Почему люди из теневого мира никогда не пользовались Telegram - и тем более не будут пользоваться MAX. Какие даркнет-мессенджеры реально используются и считаются удобными: Jabber, Signal, Session, SimpleX, Element и другие. От чего на самом деле зависит твоя анонимность, какие есть уровни безопасности и почему некоторые "самые защищенные" варианты таковыми не являются. Сейчас Фландерс все разложит по полочкам.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ORgtkH0NE-M
